overview: Sultai Midrange in Pioneer leverages efficient one-mana removal and resilient creatures to stabilize early and outvalue opponents in the mid-to-late game. By filtering draws with Consult the Star Charts and applying immediate pressure with Shark Typhoon, the deck aims to control the board while maintaining card advantage. Fatal Push ensures that early threats are neutralized efficiently, allowing your larger threats to clear the path.
win_conditions: Outlasting opponents through superior card advantage and efficient removal
Closing out games with Shark Typhoon's flying and direct damage potential
Stabilizing with resilient creatures and filtering into finishers via Consult the Star Charts

keep_criteria: Hands with Fatal Push and a one-drop creature
Hands containing Consult the Star Charts and early interaction
Hands with two removal spells and a Shark Typhoon
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking any one-mana spells or early interaction
Hands with only high-cost creatures and no draw
Hands missing land drops for the first three turns

early_game: Play lands and cast Fatal Push to remove early aggressive threats
Use Consult the Star Charts to filter into better hands and draw cards
Deploy Shark Typhoon to establish board presence and apply pressure
mid_game: Trade efficiently with removal while preserving card advantage
Use Shark Typhoon's ability to deal direct damage or block efficiently
Filter draws to find larger threats and additional interaction
late_game: Stabilize the board with resilient creatures and continued card draw
Leverage Shark Typhoon's flying to bypass blockers and close the game
Maintain pressure while outlasting opponents through superior resource management

key_cards.name: Consult the Star Charts
key_cards.notes: Cast early to dig for removal or finishers; prioritize keeping it in opening hands for consistency.

key_cards.name: Shark Typhoon
key_cards.role: Efficient threat and direct damage engine
key_cards.notes: Attack with it to deal 2 damage to the opponent if you control another creature; use its flying to bypass early blockers.

key_cards.name: Fatal Push
key_cards.notes: Hold up for combat tricks or use on opponent's turn to clear one-drops and two-drops efficiently; prioritize it in mulligans.

sequencing_tips: Hold Fatal Push for combat tricks to maximize value against aggressive decks
Cast Consult the Star Charts before playing threats to ensure you have answers ready
Use Shark Typhoon's direct damage ability when you have a clear path to victory or need to close out a game quickly

matchups.advice: Prioritize keeping Fatal Push and early interaction; use Shark Typhoon to block and apply pressure while filtering into larger threats.
watch_for: Board wipes that clear your early board

matchups.advice: Play around counterspells by splitting your hand; use Shark Typhoon to apply pressure while they search for answers.
Race efficiently by leveraging card advantage; use Fatal Push to clear their early threats and Shark Typhoon to maintain board presence.

common_threats: Flying threats that bypass your blockers
Board wipes that reset the board state
